name: Tool Agent
description: Wrap a paid tool, MCP server action, or bot command with DNA x402 receipt verification.
degenPitch: Charge for useful tool calls and prove every unlock.
whatItDoes: Quotes a paid tool call before execution.
Verifies receipt before running the expensive or premium action.
Returns a receipt ID with the tool result.
notInBetaScope: Tools that move user funds without client-side signing
cursorPrompt: Create a paid MCP tool using DNA x402. Before executing the tool, request a quote, commit, finalize payment, verify the signed receipt, and return the tool result with the receipt ID. Do not add backend custody or backend signing.
suggestedPrompt: Create a paid MCP tool using DNA x402. Before executing the tool, request a quote, commit, finalize payment, verify the signed receipt, and return the tool result with the receipt ID. Do not add backend custody or backend signing.
receiptProofBehavior: Tool execution starts only after receipt verification.
Webhook delivery can update external systems after unlock.
